description: A passenger has arrived at their destination, but their checked bag did not. An agent at the baggage service office must create a claim.

nodes.task_description: Get the passenger's baggage claim receipt and flight details.
Use the baggage tracking system to trace the bag's last known location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the bag was last scanned at the departure airport but not loaded onto the connecting flight.

nodes.task_description: Create a new mishandled baggage report, provide the passenger with a file reference number, and explain the process for delivery.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the report and clearly explains the next steps to the passenger.
